description: An amazing stray visiting a private home in Rollinsville. First noticed by the home owners on 6/3 at their video-enabled bird feeder. A friend of a friend heard about it through a community FB post, we negotiated a visit and the bird was very cooperative.An amazing stray visiting a private home in Rollinsville. First noticed by the home owners on 6/3 at their video-enabled bird feeder. A friend of a friend heard about it through a community FB post, we negotiated a visit and the bird was very cooperative. Not seen after June 5th.eBird Checklist
